Notice Of Default Prove-Up Hearing Re: Plaintiffs Request For Judgment By Default By Court
Off Calendar Dec-23-2014 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Harry M. Dorfman, Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos, CSR: Mitch Lyon, #6848

Richard A. Solomon, Esq., appearing for Plaintiff, CANDLES OF GRASSY MEADOWS II, L.L.C., a west Virginia limited liabilit corporation.
Order Granting waiver of Witness Requirement of Hearing on Application for Default Prove-up, on file.
No appearance by defaulted defendant(s) AVOCA LLC, a Nevada limited liability corporation; PAUL BRENNAN, aka PAUL V. BRENNAN.
Default of Defendant(s) has been duly entered.

After Evidence and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff and against Defaulted Defendant(s) as follows:

Damages: $248,334.90
Pre-Judgment Interest: $44,415.73
Attorney's Fees: $3,830.00
Costs: $764.50
Total Judgment in the amount of $297,345.13
Judgment signed in open court.

Richard A. Solomon, Esq. of Solomon, Grindle, Silverman & Wintringer, Tel. 858.793.8500, for plaintiff and moving party, by Court Call;

RULING: The matter was discussed. Plaintiff provided the court with a valid proof of service. For good cause shown, the tentative ruling is vacated and PLAINTIFF CADLES OF GRASY MEADOWS II, LLC'S (Amended) Application For Right To Attach Order And Order For Issuance Of Writ Of Attachment (as to Defendant Paul Brennan aka Paul V.
